n: To Bamfurlong: Restocking the Mushroom Tent

steps.t: Bamfurlong is in the Marish, the south-easternmost part of the Shire that is still west of the Brandywine. You should run to the famed mushroom farm a…
Sperling Took, the supplier of the Farmers Faire, can be found in Bywater. You should return to Bywater as quickly as you can, taking bites of the pie…
